hook: Climate insurance that pays the moment a satellite confirms the heat dome, not after a 90-day claims fight.
core_problem: 32M US SMBs (farms, restaurants, marinas) lose 2-8 weeks of revenue to climate events; traditional BI insurance pays months later, if at all.
ai_leverage: Satellite + weather-API agent watches predefined triggers; payout agent disburses to a Stripe account within 24h of trigger.
monetization_logic: 1.5-3% of insured revenue annually; reinsurance-backed; ~25% loss ratio target.
distribution_strategy: Embedded in vertical SaaS (Square for restaurants, FarmLogs for ag); broker channel for >$500k policies.
retention_loop: Trigger history per location; switching loses underwriting precision.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-location climate-loss correlation corpus improves trigger pricing; competitors lack the longitudinal dataset.

scalability_rationale: Parametric = no claims adjusters; scales with reinsurance capacity, not headcount.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: heat + flood + wind for SMB. Stage 2: supply-chain disruption parametric. Stage 3: sovereign-level cat bonds for emerging markets.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state DOI parametric rules vary; license footprint scoped first
unsustainable_unit_economics: reinsurance-backed; claims ratio managed via trigger calibration
validation_invocation: Own the satellite + IoT trigger data layer; traditional carriers underwrite blind.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Python + FastAPI + Postgres + Sentinel Hub + Tomorrow.io + Stripe
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Satellite imagery, weather APIs, per-location revenue baselines.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + Snowflake; SOC 2 + state DOI filings.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Actuary approves any trigger calibration; CFO approves payout >$50k.

ui_ux_invocation: SMB sees nothing until a trigger fires; gets an SMS 'Payout of $12,400 sent' and a Stripe receipt.

hook: Cyber insurance that comes with an AI security operator — not just a check after the breach.
core_problem: 8M US small businesses have no cyber coverage; brokers won't quote them; ransomware attacks against SMBs grew 300% in 2 years.
ai_leverage: Continuous-monitoring agent watches DNS, email, endpoint posture; remediation agent applies fixes; underwriting agent re-prices monthly based on posture score.
distribution_strategy: MSP partnerships (3,000+ MSPs serve SMBs); embedded in IT-management SaaS.
retention_loop: Posture score history is account-locked; carrier switching forfeits the discount earned.

moat_potential.rationale: Monitoring + insurance bundled; insurance alone is commodity, monitoring alone is unaffordable for SMB.

scalability_rationale: MSP channel + automated monitoring; underwriting scales with API.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: 5-50 employee SMBs via MSPs. Stage 2: mid-market direct. Stage 3: cyber + E&O + D&O bundled outcome-based policies.
failure_avoidance: fake_ai_trap: publish monthly automation rate + breach response SLAs
regulatory_blind_spot: state DOI cyber rules + NAIC model law alignment
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for SMB digital safety; MSPs and carriers depend on us.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: DNS, email, endpoint, cloud posture; per-vertical breach corpus.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Underwriter approves any policy >$1M; security officer approves remediation playbooks.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner sees a posture score; chat asks 'why did my score drop' and gets a numerically grounded answer.

hook: A freelancer health co-op priced like a group plan, governed like a community.
core_problem: 70M US gig workers face individual ACA premiums 40-70% above group rates; existing solutions (Stride, HealthSherpa) only shop, not negotiate.
ai_leverage: Pool-formation agent clusters members by geography + risk; negotiation agent bids carriers for group rates monthly.
monetization_logic: $25/mo membership + 1% of premium savings; pool returns 95% of margin to members.
distribution_strategy: Freelancer marketplaces (Upwork, Toptal) + community channels (creator collectives).
retention_loop: Pool membership history compounds; switching forfeits pool credits and re-underwriting.

moat_potential.rationale: Two-sided pool size compounds bargaining leverage; new entrants start with zero pool.

scalability_rationale: Geographic pool density determines negotiating power; multi-state expansion gated by DOI filings.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: solo freelancer pools. Stage 2: agency + small studio pools. Stage 3: cross-border pools for digital nomads.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state DOI association health plan rules; licensed broker-of-record
unsustainable_unit_economics: co-op model returns margin to members; sustained by membership growth, not premium markup
validation_invocation: Indispensable health infrastructure for the gig economy; members and carriers both win.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Vouch + HealthSherpa API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Member demographics, claims history, carrier rate cards.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + KMS; HIPAA + HITRUST; per-state DOI filings.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Licensed broker approves every group renewal; member-elected board approves pool changes.

ui_ux_invocation: Member joins a pool; agent shops + negotiates; member approves the chosen plan.

hook: Renters insurance that fights your landlord's deposit grab on your behalf.
core_problem: 44M US renter households lose $1.2B/yr to wrongful security deposit withholding; renters insurance pays for theft but ignores deposit disputes.
ai_leverage: Inspection-doc agent timestamps move-in/move-out; dispute agent drafts demand letters + small-claims filings.
distribution_strategy: PLG via 'free move-in inspection report' wedge; landlord-tech partnerships (RentRedi, Buildium).
retention_loop: Inspection history per address compounds; renters return for every new lease.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-landlord dispute outcome corpus identifies repeat offenders; valuable to renters and regulators.

scalability_rationale: DOI filings per state are a 6-12 month grind; advocacy automation scales fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: renters insurance + deposit advocacy. Stage 2: landlord rating network. Stage 3: tenant rights API for housing platforms.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state DOI renters rules + UPL boundaries on legal advocacy
unsustainable_unit_economics: outcome-based recovery upsell keeps ARPU healthy
validation_invocation: Defensible per-landlord data + advocacy; reject vanity policy count.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Inspection photos, lease terms, per-landlord dispute outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + S3 image store; DOI compliance per state.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Bar-licensed paralegal reviews any small-claims filing; user approves any settlement.

ui_ux_invocation: Renter snaps move-in photos; agent handles disputes silently; renter sees 'recovered $850' notification.

hook: Pet insurance that pays you to keep your dog healthy, not just to fix what's broken.
core_problem: 180M US pets cost $30B/yr in vet bills; existing pet insurance (Trupanion, Lemonade) is reactive and excludes preventive care.
ai_leverage: Wellness agent reads wearable + vet record data; underwriting agent re-prices monthly based on wellness score.
distribution_strategy: Vet clinic + pet-store retail partnerships; PLG via free wellness assessment.
retention_loop: Wellness score + claims history are pet-locked; switching forfeits accumulated discount.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-breed wellness correlation corpus improves underwriting; competitors price on age + breed alone.

scalability_rationale: DOI filings per state; wearable adoption is the input bottleneck.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: dogs in 10 states. Stage 2: cats + exotics nationally. Stage 3: pet-life-cycle bundle (food, meds, end-of-life).
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state DOI + AVMA-aligned data sharing
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the wellness data + actuarial model, not a Lemonade clone
validation_invocation: Own the per-breed wellness data layer; competitors price on demographic averages.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Fitbark + EVet API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Wearable telemetry, vet records, breed claims atlas.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Veterinary advisor reviews claims >$2k; underwriter approves rate changes.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner sees a monthly wellness report + cashback; agent handles claims directly with the vet.

hook: Aviation underwriting for the eVTOL era — priced per flight-minute, not per annual policy.
core_problem: Emerging eVTOL operators face Lloyd's-grade premiums priced on legacy rotorcraft loss tables; pricing is wrong by 3-5x and locks operators out.
ai_leverage: Telemetry-ingest agent reads flight data; underwriting agent re-prices per route + weather + pilot history.
distribution_strategy: Direct partnership with eVTOL operators (Joby, Archer, Beta); FAA + EASA regulatory engagement.
retention_loop: Per-operator telemetry corpus locks underwriting accuracy.

moat_potential.rationale: First-mover with FAA/EASA on parametric eVTOL rates; competitors face years of regulatory work.

scalability_rationale: eVTOL fleet scaling determines TAM; underwriting tech is leverageable.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: eVTOL operators. Stage 2: cargo drones. Stage 3: full UAM (urban air mobility) liability stack.
failure_avoidance: hardware_scaling_chasm: ride the operators, don't build the airframe — Lilium's lesson
regulatory_blind_spot: FAA Part 135 + EASA SC-VTOL alignment from day one
validation_invocation: Own the per-flight telemetry data; legacy aviation underwriters work from annual aggregates.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: ADS-B flight tracks, weather, pilot logs, eVTOL airframe telemetry.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Aviation underwriter approves any new operator class or new aircraft model.

ui_ux_invocation: Operator sees a per-flight invoice; underwriting is automatic.

hook: Business interruption insurance that maps your supply chain and pays when a Tier-2 supplier goes dark.
core_problem: Mid-market manufacturers lose $200B/yr to supply-chain disruptions; existing BI policies require named-cause; cascading supplier failures aren't covered.
ai_leverage: Graph agent maps supplier dependencies from PO + AP data; trigger agent watches news/satellite/port data for disruptions.
monetization_logic: $5-50k/mo by manufacturer revenue + claims payout; reinsurance-backed.
distribution_strategy: Embedded in ERP (NetSuite, SAP B1) + procurement SaaS partnerships.
retention_loop: Supplier graph + risk telemetry compound; switching forfeits months of mapping.

moat_potential.rationale: Multi-tier supplier graph is unique per customer + becomes a network asset.

scalability_rationale: ERP integration scales the channel; graph mapping is automated.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: mid-market manufacturers. Stage 2: F500 procurement bundle. Stage 3: cross-industry supplier reputation network.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state DOI BI rules + reinsurance treaty alignment
fake_ai_trap: publish quarterly trigger-precision metrics
validation_invocation: Own the multi-tier supplier graph; legacy carriers see only direct suppliers.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Python + Neo4j + Postgres + Sentinel Hub + Snowflake
technical_mvp_sketch.data: PO/AP data, port telemetry, news, satellite, customs filings.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Underwriter approves any policy >$5M payout cap; risk officer reviews graph thresholds.

ui_ux_invocation: CFO sees a supply-chain risk map; chat asks 'what happens if Shenzhen goes down 5 days' and gets a $ exposure answer.

hook: Revenue insurance for creators when YouTube demonetizes you on Tuesday.
core_problem: 12M creators have income tied to platforms that can demonetize without notice; no one underwrites platform-suspension risk.
ai_leverage: Income-monitoring agent baselines per-creator earnings; trigger agent fires on >40% drop tied to suspension event.
monetization_logic: 2-5% of monthly revenue; payout = up to 12 weeks of baseline income.
distribution_strategy: PLG via 'see my baseline' wedge; partnerships with creator-economy SaaS (Linktree, Beacons).
retention_loop: Baseline + claims history compound; switching loses earned discount.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-platform suspension-rate corpus underwrites future products; new entrants lack the data.

scalability_rationale: API-driven monitoring; reinsurance capacity is the constraint.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: YouTube/TikTok creators. Stage 2: Patreon/Substack creators. Stage 3: cross-platform creator income smoothing product.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state DOI parametric rules + NAIC model law alignment
unsustainable_unit_economics: trigger calibration controls loss ratio
validation_invocation: Defensible parametric trigger; loss ratio managed via underwriting calibration.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-platform earnings, suspension corpus, creator demographics.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Underwriter approves payout >$50k or any new platform onboarded.

ui_ux_invocation: Creator gets paid out 24h after a confirmed demonetization event.

hook: STR insurance that adjusts coverage by the night and the booking source.
core_problem: 2.4M US STR hosts run uninsured or under-insured because traditional homeowner policies exclude STR; Airbnb's host guarantee covers <30% of claims.
ai_leverage: Booking-graph agent watches Airbnb/Vrbo/Booking iCal; coverage agent adjusts policy nightly per occupant + duration.
monetization_logic: $3-12 per night-occupied + $25/mo base; charged per booking via host's payout.
distribution_strategy: PMS (Hostfully, OwnerRez) + Airbnb partner integration; PLG via 'connect calendar, see your gaps' wedge.
retention_loop: Booking history + claims history compound per property; switching forfeits property history.

moat_potential.rationale: Sits inside PMS; survives carrier shopping because the data + automation lives in the workflow.

scalability_rationale: API-driven; reinsurance capacity is the constraint.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: STR insurance. Stage 2: PMS-bundled risk + ops + cleaning. Stage 3: STR-as-asset-class for fractional ownership platforms.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state DOI STR rules + municipal STR ordinances
unsustainable_unit_economics: per-night pricing + claims data keeps loss ratio in line
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for STR ecosystem; PMS, hosts, carriers all benefit.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Python + Postgres + Hostfully API + OwnerRez API + Stripe
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Booking calendars, guest demographics, claims history per property.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Underwriter approves new property class; ops reviews any claim >$10k.

ui_ux_invocation: Host connects PMS; coverage adjusts silently per booking; claims handled in chat.

hook: Income insurance for hourly workers that pays the day a shift gets cut.
core_problem: 55M hourly workers face shift cuts with no buffer; existing wage-advance services (DailyPay, Earnin) provide cash, not insurance.
ai_leverage: Schedule-monitor agent ingests employer scheduling data; trigger agent pays a defined benefit when actual hours drop below baseline.
monetization_logic: $8-15/mo via payroll deduction; payout up to 40h baseline.
distribution_strategy: Embedded in workforce-mgmt SaaS (When I Work, Deputy); B2B2C via employer benefits.
retention_loop: Baseline + payout history compound; switching forfeits earned credit.

moat_potential.rationale: Sits inside scheduling software; workers don't have to manage anything.

scalability_rationale: Workforce SaaS channel scales fast; reinsurance is the cap.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: hourly retail + restaurant. Stage 2: gig platforms. Stage 3: full income-smoothing product (advances + insurance + savings).
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: CFPB EWA rules + state DOI parametric income coverage
unsustainable_unit_economics: subscription + reinsurance keeps loss ratio in band
validation_invocation: Defensible parametric trigger backed by payroll data; reject vanity user counts.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Python + Postgres + ADP + When-I-Work API + Stripe
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Scheduling data, payroll, employer rosters, regional unemployment baselines.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Underwriter approves new employer; payroll team confirms first payout cycle.

ui_ux_invocation: Worker enrolls via employer; sees payout SMS the day a shift cut is detected.
